news.headline: Germany's seasonally adjusted unemployment increased by 19k, missing the forecast of 15k. Last month showed a decrease of 25k.
Germany's unemployment rate rises to 6% in latest report, slightly exceeding forecasted and previous percentages.
Argus appoints Maria Hooper with 15+ years energy experience to its board of directors.
news.summary: London, June 28, 2024 - Argus, a leading energy and commodity price reporting agency, recently announced the appointment of Maria Hooper to its board of directors. With more than 15 years of experience in the energy sector, Maria has held key leadership positions at ConocoPhillips (COP) and Phillips. This appointment aims to enhance the diversity and expertise within the board, bringing valuable insights to the company's strategic decisions and operations. Maria Hooper's wealth of knowledge is expected to contribute significantly to Argus' global presence and market influence.

news.headline: Advantech adds support for Windows 11 IoT Enterprise LTSC 2024 on edge computing platform for increased stability.
news.summary: In Taipei on June 28, 2024, Advantech (TWSE: 2395), a prominent AIoT platform and services provider, excitedly revealed its incorporation of support for Windows 11 IoT Enterprise LTSC 2024 into its edge computing platform. This integration of Windows 11's cutting-edge technology...

news.headline: Regent Hong Kong wins Best Hotel in Hong Kong at Travel + Leisure Awards, attracting global visitors since reopening in Nov 2023.
news.summary: In November 2023, Regent Hong Kong reopened its doors and has since gained significant acclaim. Situated on Victoria Harbour, the hotel has become a top choice for global travelers seeking a tranquil setting. It has received several prestigious awards and continues to attract discerning guests.

news.headline: Malaysian currency expected to strengthen with rebound in exports and Fed rate cuts.
Biden falters in Europe with open Bloomberg event.
Truecaller AB cancels 28,647,115 series B shares bought back, impacting total shares as of Jun 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Truecaller AB announced the cancellation of 28,647,115 series B shares that were repurchased as part of their buyback program. This decision was made following the resolution of the Annual General Meeting held on May 23, 2024. As of the same date, the total number of shares in the company...

news.headline: Wondershare Filmora's whitepaper explores Gen Z's views on AI, influencers, and content creation. Released in June 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 28, 2024, Wondershare Filmora, a leading video editing software for young creators, published its inaugural Gen Z Whitepaper. The report stems from an in-depth interview and survey that delves into Gen Z's social reflection. This significant study uncovers key insights into the behavior and attitudes of Gen Z, offering valuable perspectives for marketers and industry professionals.

news.headline: Bitcoin sentiment drop suggests market bottom as BTC fails to reach new ATH for over 3 months post-halving.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin (BTC) has not reached a new record high for more than three months following the halving that occurred in April.

news.headline: Juhan Aguraiuja appointed as Enefit Green Chairman, starts Oct 14. CEO Aavo Kärmas to step down July 1. Board term is 3 years.
news.summary: Juhan Aguraiuja, previously in charge of Adven's Baltic operations, has been named the new Chairman of the Management Board at Enefit Green by the Supervisory Board. Taking over on October 14, he will serve a standard 3-year term as per the Articles of Associations. Aavo Kärmas, the existing CEO of Enefit Green, will step down from his position on July 1, following mutual agreement with the Supervisory Board.

news.headline: Solana ETF could increase SOL's price by 9x says GSR Markets, with a potential 1.4x increase in a bear scenario.
news.summary: The market maker predicted a bullish outlook for Solana with a "blue sky" scenario, envisioning a significant price increase. In contrast, their "bear" scenario only anticipated a modest 1.4x price increase for Solana.

news.headline: Kraken’s co-founder Jesse Powell donates $1M in Ether to support pro-crypto Trump campaign, advocating against regulation.
news.summary: Kraken co-founder, Jesse Powell, shows his support for Trump by donating $1 million worth of Ether. He advocates for pro-crypto policies to counter regulatory crackdowns.

news.headline: Worldcoin (WLD) discloses Wave1 Community Grants recipients, empowering tech innovation. #blockchain #crypto #grant #community
news.summary: Worldcoin (WLD) has announced the recipients of its Wave1 Community Grants, distributed to support innovation in diverse technology sectors. The grants aim to empower individuals and organizations contributing to the advancement of technology. This initiative demonstrates Worldcoin's commitment to fostering growth and development in the tech community.

news.headline: Hayashi of Japan's Cabinet: No comment on Forex rates.
Japanese Chief Cabinet Secretary Hayashi is monitoring foreign exchange movements closely.
Hayashi from Japan states action for excessive FX fluctuations will be taken. #CabinetSecretary #Japan #FX
Japanese Chief Cabinet Secretary Hayashi stresses stability in currency movements, tied to economic fundamentals.
Japan's Chief Cabinet Secretary expresses concern over rapid currency movements.
Stephan Séjourné joins MAX Power Mining Corp as Natural Hydrogen Scientific Advisor. Vancouver, June 28, 2024.
news.summary: MAX Power Mining Corp., headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed on June 28, 2024, that Mr. Stephan Séjourné, P.Geo., has become their Natural Hydrogen Scientific Advisor. The company, listed on the CSE as MAXX, OTC as MAXXF, and Frankfurt as 89N, expressed delight in the recent addition to their team.

news.headline: atNorth wins award at RAC Cooling Industry Awards for innovative cooling tech and customer service. Jun 28, 2024.
news.summary: An esteemed data center business in the Nordic region was recently commended for its cutting-edge cooling technology and commitment to customer service. Recognized as a leader in the industry, atNorth, based in Reykjavik, Iceland, has been lauded for its innovative approach. The company offers a range of services including colocation, high-performance computing, and artificial intelligence solutions. Their exceptional dedication to customer satisfaction has earned them recognition in the sector. The accolade was received on June 28, 2024, proving the company's position as a standout in the industry.

news.headline: $800 mln flowed into emerging market debt, the highest in 3 months, while $6.4 bln went into EM stocks, the largest in 20 weeks - BofA using EPFR data.
$900 mln outflows from high yield bonds, biggest in 10 weeks - Bank of America, EPFR data noted.
$3.6 billion left tech stocks last week, biggest outflow in 16 weeks, after record inflow the week before - BofA cites EPFR data.
European stocks witnessed outflows of $2.1 billion in a week, the highest in 14 weeks, per BofA referencing EPFR Data.
"Captain Tsubasa: Dream Team" 7th Anniversary Campaign kicks off with limited edition superstars from Brazil National Team.
news.summary: In Tokyo on June 28, 2024, KLab Inc., a prominent online mobile games company, revealed that its popular head-to-head football simulation game, Captain Tsubasa: Dream Team, is hosting its 7th Anniversary Campaign. For further details, refer to the official press release on KLab Inc.'s website.

news.headline: CCL Logistics & Technology named Technology Company of the Year at Multimodal Awards in UK. Other winners: DP World, Maersk, etc.
news.summary: CCL Logistics & Technology (CCL) was honored as the Technology Company of the Year at the Multimodal Awards held at the NEC in Birmingham, part of the UK's top supply chain conference and logistics expo. This recognition celebrates exceptional companies in the Transport and Logistics industry. Other notable winners included DP World, Maersk, Iron Mountain, Sky, Kuehne+Nagel, and Forth Ports. CCL's CEO and founder stood out among the industry leaders recognized at this event.

news.headline: Diane Wang, CEO of DHGATE, honored with CEO TODAY GLOBAL AWARDS 2024 for e-commerce and women empowerment.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Beijing, Diane Wang, the Founder, Chairperson, and CEO of DHGATE Group, was honored with the CEO TODAY GLOBAL AWARDS 2024. This prestigious award acknowledges her remarkable achievements in the field of e-commerce and her dedication to supporting women entrepreneurs.

news.headline: ECB urges national authorities to keep existing capital buffer requirements.
Currency ranking by strength (strongest to weakest): GBP, USD, CHF, EUR, JPY, CAD, AUD, NZD.
All Seas Capital invests in Synergym, leading gym chain in Spain, to aid expansion plans.
news.summary: London-based investment firm All Seas Capital has recently made a substantial minority investment in Synergym, a prominent gym chain in Spain. This investment marks a major milestone for Synergym as it continues its rapid growth and solidifies its position as a key player in the fitness industry.

news.headline: Local government's finance arm raises £250M through MTN programme in new benchmark issuance.
Algorand marks 5th anniversary, boasting 2B transactions & real-world use cases at Decipher conference, funding innovation.
news.summary: The Summer of Algorand has been initiated by The Algorand Foundation in Barcelona, Spain on June 28, 2024. This non-profit organization is focused on driving innovation on a large scale through investments in technology, partnerships, and marketing. Their goal is to create a world where integrity in information is paramount. The Foundation plans to inject significant funds into various initiatives to support this mission.

news.headline: OMG Agency OMD named Media Network of the Year at Cannes. Partnered with retail, programmatic buying, social platforms.
news.summary: Agency OMD has been recognized as the Media Network of the Year, with PHD securing the second spot. The group announced pioneering collaborations with top retail, programmatic buying, and social platforms to link initial investments to sales. This announcement was made in New York on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Sungrow Hydrogen wins bid for world's largest green hydrogen project in China with CEEC Songyuan Industrial Park.
news.summary: In Hefei, China, on June 28, 2024, Sungrow Hydrogen secured the bid for the China Energy Engineering Corporation (CEEC) Songyuan Hydrogen Energy Industrial Park project in Jilin, China. This project, touted to be the world's most extensive green hydrogen, ammonia, and methanol integrated facility, marks a significant milestone.

news.headline: wUSDM, Manta Network's stablecoin, backed by BlackRock's BUIDL Fund via Mountain Protocol, boosting security and yield.
news.summary: Manta Network has announced that its on-chain yield-bearing stablecoin, known as wUSDM, is now supported by BlackRock's BUIDL Fund. This partnership is expected to bolster the security and increase the potential yield of wUSDM. Investors can now benefit from the stability and growth opportunities provided by this collaboration.

news.headline: Spanish inflation rate for the year at 3.4%, matching forecasts, down from 3.6% previously.
Spain's CPI MoM Flash came in at 0.3%, in line with forecasts and unchanged from the previous month's 0.3%.
Swiss KOF Indicator surpasses forecast at 102.7, up from previous 100.3.
Spain's monthly HICP rises as expected to 0.3% (previous 0.2%) in flash estimate.
Latest data: Spanish HICP YoY Flash hits 3.5%, matching forecasts, down from previous 3.8%.
Completion of share buyback programme leads to repurchase of X shares, with total value reaching $Y million.
French Producer Price Index decreased by 1.4% from the previous month, beating the forecast of a decrease of 3.6%.
French Producer Price Index yearly change is -6.7%, beating the forecast of -6.8%.
French CPI increased by 0.1% in the previous month, matching forecasts and surpassing the 0.0% from the previous period.
French CPI YoY NSA Prelim at 2.1%, slightly below the forecast of 2.2% and down from the previous 2.3%.
French inflation rate achieves 2.5% YoY, as predicted, slightly down from last month's 2.6%.
French consumer spending for the month increased significantly to 1.5%, surpassing the forecasted 0.2% rise.
French monthly HICP rises as expected by 0.1%, matching the previous month's increase.
Zealand Pharma finalizes capital increase registration process.
